name: Mida Assets Public Company Limited
summary: Mida Assets Public Company Limited engages in the sale and hire-purchase of electronic home appliances, motorcycles, and used cars in Thailand. The company also develops real estate properties; operates hotels; rents golf courses; and provides real estate agency services. In addition, it offers advertising, billboard rental, and advertising sale services; public relation and events organizing services; financial services for used cars; and security guard services. Further, the company is involved in asset management; the management of hotels, resorts, commercial buildings, condominiums, villages, and spas; and the provision of health massage. It also offers products on hire purchase, such as televisions, DVD players, air conditioners, home theatre sets, refrigerators, washing machines, electric fans, etc. As of December 31, 2020, the company operated a network of 98 branches. The company was formerly known as Nakornpathom Mida 1991 and changed its name to Mida Assets Public Company Limited in 1997. Mida Assets Public Company Limited was founded in 1991 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
